tiktok-caption-generator.user_input_template: Creator intent: {intent_label}. Content scenario: {scenario_label}. Topic or product focus: {user_text}
tiktok-caption-generator.recipe_prompt_addendum: Emphasize TikTok-native pacing and on-screen text compatibility.

hook-generator.user_input_template: Creator intent: {intent_label}. Content scenario: {scenario_label}. Hook/video topic: {user_text}
hook-generator.recipe_prompt_addendum: Hooks must match educational payoff in the script beats.

hashtag-generator.user_input_template: Creator intent: {intent_label}. Content scenario: {scenario_label}. Niche or topic for hashtag sets: {user_text}
hashtag-generator.recipe_prompt_addendum: Prefer searchable fitness tags; include one brand-safe community tag.

title-generator.user_input_template: Creator intent: {intent_label}. Content scenario: {scenario_label}. Title/topic focus: {user_text}
title-generator.recipe_prompt_addendum: Titles must match thumbnail and first 3 seconds; no misleading health claims.
